title: athlete-enrollment — TenancyHook + lifecycle hooks
description: Six cascade hooks: three archive-prevention (athlete / team / season), tenant-erasure cascade, atomic conversion coordinator, age-group snapshot resolver.

hooks.name: PreventEnrollmentOrphansOnAthleteArchived
hooks.purpose: Refuse the athlete archive when active enrollments (status IN 'submitted', 'payment_pending', 'consent_pending', 'confirmed', 'active', 'waitlisted') reference the athlete. cascade=true on the athlete archive route bypasses this + cancels enrollments in one transaction.
hooks.returns: ATHLETE_HAS_ACTIVE_ENROLLMENTS (409) with the enrollment count in the error payload

hooks.name: PreventEnrollmentOrphansOnTeamArchived
hooks.purpose: Refuse the team archive when active enrollments reference it.

hooks.name: PreventEnrollmentOrphansOnSeasonArchived
hooks.purpose: Refuse the season archive when active enrollments reference it. cascade=true on the season archive route bypasses + completes enrollments as if the season ended.

hooks.name: PurgeAthleteEnrollmentDataForErasedTenant
hooks.purpose: Cascade delete via FK. Writes compliance audit + emits count metrics per status.

hooks.name: ConvertEnrollmentToTeamMemberAtomically
hooks.purpose: P1 hook. Opens a DB transaction, SELECT ... FOR UPDATE on the enrollment row + team_members table for the team, CREATE teams::TeamMember row with (tenant_id, team_id, member_type='athlete', member_id=enrollment.athlete_id, role_on_team='player', status='active', joined_at=now(), jersey_number=enrollment.jersey_number_assigned), SETS enrollment.team_member_id = new_team_member.id, COMMITS. On any failure, rolls back both writes + fires EnrollmentAtomicityFailed. THIS IS THE LOAD-BEARING ATOMICITY GUARANTEE — the reconciler job cross-checks + surfaces any drift.
hooks.note: Priority 10 — runs BEFORE every other listener on EnrollmentActivated (which is fired only when this hook succeeds). If this hook fails, no downstream listeners fire — the enrollment stays in confirmed status.

hooks.name: SnapshotAgeGroupOnEnrollmentSubmitted
hooks.purpose: In-band snapshot of Athlete.current_age_group_id → Enrollment.age_group_snapshot_id. Fires EnrollmentAgeGroupSnapshotSet. Also runs the age_group_snapshot_matches_team_age_group rule as a SOFT-WARN (fires EnrollmentAgeGroupSnapshotMismatched but does NOT block the enrollment).

no_bootstrapper.reason: AthleteEnrollment does not need a tenant-boot hydration path. Every row loads on demand.
